title: kawasaki2d: 2D Kawasaki-Ising coarsening and the operational boundary of the Mpemba effect
description: A small, reproducible 2D Kawasaki-Ising demonstrator of conserved-order-parameter phase separation, used to study quench-dependent relaxation and coarsening timescales and to map the operational boundary between finite-system, mode-resolved anomalous relaxation and thermodynamic-limit coarsening. Includes an exact-diagonalisation spectral Mpemba probe (4x4) and an offset-controlled, pre-registered crossing search at N=128; both tiers find no Mpemba-like inversion at the studied operational points.
notes: Code under MIT; data and figures under CC-BY-4.0. Every reported number, figure, and verdict is regenerable from a recorded (config, commit, seed, environment) tuple.
